narrative:
Tiffin Township has 3,292 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
